assertions.title: Uniform button sizing; submit button must not resize when text changes
assertions.reason: Submit button maintained exactly 180×40.5 px across all text states: 'Compare Quotes' (180×40.5) → 'Comparing...' (180×40.5) → 'Compare Quotes' (180×40.5). The min-width: 180px CSS rule prevents the button from shrinking when shorter text is displayed. Prior failure (177×41 → 144×41) is resolved.

steps.expected: App loads with Compare Quotes button visible
steps.observed: App loaded; Compare Quotes button visible with text 'Compare Quotes'

steps.action: Measure submit button dimensions before click
steps.observed: Width: 180px, Height: 40.5px, min-width: 180px applied via CSS

steps.action: Install MutationObserver on submit button to log dimensions on every text change
Click Compare Quotes to trigger loading state text change
steps.expected: Button text changes to 'Comparing...' then back to 'Compare Quotes'
steps.observed: Text changed: 'Compare Quotes' → 'Comparing...' → 'Compare Quotes'. All three states logged.
All 3 entries show width: 180, height: 40.5 — zero size change across text transitions

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-CSS-010 PASS. Submit button maintains 180×40.5 px across all text states ('Compare Quotes' → 'Comparing...' → 'Compare Quotes') with zero width/height change. The min-width: 180px CSS fix resolved the prior regression where button shrank from 177px to 144px.
